items.name: notice
items.description: Inline feedback message with tone variants: success (emerald), alert (destructive), note (muted).

items.name: section-intro
items.description: Eyebrow + title + description header block for sections. Supports h2 or h3 title tag.

items.name: admin-form-actions
items.description: Flex row wrapper for admin form action buttons (submit, cancel, secondary actions).

items.name: admin-form-field
items.description: Admin form field wrapper with label, optional description, and input slot.

items.name: admin-page-shell
items.description: Admin page top-level structure: eyebrow, title, optional description and actions slot, content area with border-b separator.

items.name: admin-form-section
items.description: Card-based admin form section with optional eyebrow/title/description header separated from content.
